name: Two Sum
description: Given an array of integers and a target, return indices of two numbers whose sum is the target.
author: Admin

name: Reverse String
description: Reverse a string and return the result.
author: Admin

name: Palindrome Number
description: Determine if an integer is a palindrome.
author: Admin

name: Anagram Check
description: Check if two strings are anagrams.
author: Admin

name: Fibonacci Number
description: Compute the nth Fibonacci number.
author: Admin

name: Valid Parentheses
description: Determine if input string with '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']' is valid.
author: Admin

name: Merge Two Sorted Arrays
description: Merge two sorted arrays into one sorted array.
author: Admin

name: Maximum Subarray Sum
description: Find the contiguous subarray which has the largest sum.
author: Admin

name: Number of 1 Bits
description: Count the number of '1' bits in an integer.
author: Admin

name: Count Vowels in String
description: Count how many vowels are in a string.
author: Admin

name: Power of Two
description: Check if a number is a power of two.
author: Admin

name: Majority Element
description: Find the majority element (appears more than n/2 times).
author: Admin

name: Rotate Array
description: Rotate the array to the right by k steps.
author: Admin

name: Sum of Natural Numbers (Recursion)
description: Find sum of first n natural numbers recursively.
author: Admin

name: Count Inversions in Array
description: Count the number of inversion pairs (i < j and arr[i] > arr[j]).
author: Admin

name: Merge Intervals
description: Given a collection of intervals, merge all overlapping intervals.
author: Admin

name: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Find the length of longest substring without repeating characters.
author: Admin

name: Minimum Path Sum
description: Given a m x n grid with non-negative numbers, find a path from top left to bottom right which minimizes the sum.
author: Admin

name: Coin Change
description: Given coins of different denominations and a total, compute fewest coins needed to make up the total.
author: Admin

name: Unique Paths
description: A robot is located at top-left of m x n grid. How many unique paths to bottom-right corner (only right/down moves)?
author: Admin

name: Climbing Stairs
description: You can climb 1 or 2 stairs at a time. How many distinct ways to climb to the top (n stairs)?
author: Admin

name: Binary Search
description: Implement binary search to find the index of target in a sorted array. Return -1 if not found.
author: Admin

name: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
description: Given a rotated sorted array with distinct elements, find the minimum value.
author: Admin

name: First Unique Character in a String
description: Return the index of the first non-repeating character in the string; -1 if it doesn't exist.
author: Admin

name: Intersection of Two Arrays
description: Compute the intersection (unique values) of two arrays.
author: Admin

name: Move Zeroes
description: Move all zeroes to the end while maintaining the relative order of non-zero elements.
author: Admin

name: Plus One
description: Given a non-empty array of digits representing a non-negative integer, plus one to the integer.
author: Admin

name: Implement Queue Using Stacks
description: Implement a queue using two stacks. Support enqueue and dequeue.
author: Admin

testCases.input: enqueue 1; enqueue 2; dequeue; enqueue 3; dequeue; dequeue
enqueue 10; dequeue; enqueue 20; enqueue 30; dequeue; dequeue

name: Valid Sudoku
description: Check if a 9x9 Sudoku board is valid. Only filled cells must be validated.
author: Admin

name: Search Insert Position
description: If target exists in array return its index; otherwise, return the index where it would be inserted in order.
author: Admin

name: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
description: You are given an array where the ith element is the price of a given stock on day i. Find the max profit by buying and then selling.
author: Admin

name: Minimum Depth of Binary Tree
description: Given a binary tree, find its minimum depth (number of nodes along the shortest path from root node to nearest leaf node).
author: Admin

name: Symmetric Tree
description: Given a binary tree, check whether it is mirror symmetric.
author: Admin

name: Merge Sorted Linked Lists
description: Merge two sorted linked lists and return as a sorted list.
author: Admin

name: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
description: Remove duplicates in-place from a sorted array. Return new length and contents.
author: Admin

name: Generate Parentheses
description: Given n pairs of parentheses, generate all valid combinations.
author: Admin

name: Longest Common Prefix
description: Write a function to find the longest common prefix string among an array of strings.
author: Admin

name: Minimum Stack
description: Design a stack that supports push, pop, top, and retrieving the minimum element in constant time.
author: Admin

testCases.input: push -2; push 0; push -3; getMin; pop; top; getMin
push 2; push 0; push 3; push 0; getMin; pop; getMin; pop; getMin; pop; getMin

name: Contains Duplicate
description: Given an array, return true if any value appears at least twice.
author: Admin

name: Single Number
description: Find the single number in an array where every element appears twice except one.
author: Admin

name: Reverse Linked List
description: Reverse a singly linked list.
author: Admin

name: Intersection of Two Linked Lists
description: Given two singly linked lists, return the node at which they intersect, or null.
author: Admin
